CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:OrdersOrchestrator.kt$OrdersOrchestrator$( private val createOrderUseCase: CreateOrderUseCase, private val applyToOrderUseCase: ApplyToOrderUseCase, private val withdrawApplicationUseCase: WithdrawApplicationUseCase, private val selectApplicantUseCase: SelectApplicantUseCase, private val unselectApplicantUseCase: UnselectApplicantUseCase, private val startOrderUseCase: StartOrderUseCase, private val cancelOrderUseCase: CancelOrderUseCase, private val completeOrderUseCase: CompleteOrderUseCase, private val refreshOrdersUseCase: RefreshOrdersUseCase, private val appLogger: AppLogger, )
